Metadata.defaultTitle: Explore Malta Rentals | Motorcycle, ATV & Bicycle Hire
Metadata.defaultDescription: Rent a motorbike, ATV or bicycle with Explore Malta Rentals. Experience the island your way, at your own pace, or a guided custom tour around Malta. Quick booking and local advice, at the most affordable rates.

Common.responseTimeBody: Within a short time (usually the same day). If you're unsure which vehicle fits your plans, send your dates and preferred pickup time.

Home.aboutBusinessTagline: Choose the right ride, get clear guidance, and explore Malta with confidence.
Home.aboutPricingSupporting: Straightforward daily rates on selected scooters and bikes — check each vehicle for full pricing, deposits, and add-ons.
Home.aboutParagraph1: We rent motorcycles, ATVs, and bikes from Pietà, Malta, so exploring the island feels straightforward, not stressful.
Home.aboutParagraph2: We help you pick the right vehicle and plan; our team is safety-minded, service-focused, and built for visitors.
Home.quickCtaTitle: Malta is waiting — make it yours.
Home.quickCtaDescription: Explore Malta Rentals — your go-to choice to experience Malta your way. From affordable self-drive options to guided tours, we are passionate about helping locals and visitors experience the beauty of Malta in the most free, flexible, and affordable way possible. It starts with one booking.
Home.sectionFleetDescription: Pick the ride that matches your licence, comfort level, and Malta itinerary — from nimble scooters to adventure-ready ATVs.
Home.sectionServicesDescription: Straightforward rental support, safety-first kit, and flexible options so your Malta trip stays easy from pickup to return.
Home.testimonialsDescription: Real feedback from visitors who explored Malta with us — quick handovers, clear guidance, and memorable rides.

t1.name: Marta
t1.quote: Pickup was smooth, the bike felt like new, and we had the best day exploring around Malta.

t2.name: Daniel
t2.quote: Clear instructions, friendly support, and great recommendations for where to go. Highly recommend!

t3.name: Sofia
t3.quote: Perfect for our Malta plan. Comfortable ride, quick communication, and a super easy process.

Faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)
Faq.subtitleLead: Can't find what you're looking for? Reach out on
Faq.subtitleTail: or use the contact section below.

trial.question: How do I book a bike or scooter?
trial.answer: Use the booking form at the top of this page to choose pick-up location, vehicle type, and pick-up date. You can also message us on WhatsApp and we will walk you through availability and the best option for your trip.

plan.question: What licence do I need for 50cc vs 125cc?
plan.answer: Requirements depend on your licence and local rules. Tell us what licence you hold when you book and we will confirm which categories you can ride. We prioritise safety and compliance on every rental.

cancel.question: What is your cancellation policy?
cancel.answer: Policies can vary by season and vehicle. Contact us with your booking details and we will explain the options. We aim to be fair and clear so you can plan your Malta trip with confidence.

invoice.question: Are helmets and safety gear included?
invoice.answer: Yes — helmets are included with rentals, along with a phone holder accessory for navigation. If you need a specific helmet size or have other safety questions, tell us when you book so we can have everything ready at handover.

billing.question: How does pricing and billing work?
billing.answer: Rates are based on your rental period and vehicle category. You will see what applies before you confirm. For exact quotes or longer hires, WhatsApp us with your dates.

email.question: Can I return the bike somewhere other than Pietà?
email.answer: It depends on the vehicle and dates. Message us on WhatsApp with your plans and we will confirm whether return elsewhere or hotel delivery is possible.

support.question: How does support work for tourists?
support.answer: We are set up for visitors: clear handover instructions, practical tips for riding in Malta, and quick help on WhatsApp if something comes up during your rental.

tutorials.question: Do you offer guided tours?
tutorials.answer: Yes. We offer rentals plus guided tours so you can explore Malta with support if you prefer not to go alone. Ask when you book and we will share what is running during your stay.

projects.question: Can I extend my rental once I am in Malta?
projects.answer: Often yes, subject to availability. Message us before your return time and we will do our best to extend your booking.

team.question: Do I need to leave a deposit?
team.answer: Deposit and ID requirements are explained at booking confirmation. If you are unsure, send us a WhatsApp message and we will outline exactly what is needed for your chosen vehicle.

Contact.title: Contact us
Contact.description: Call, message, or visit — we're here to help you choose the right ride. Your mobile number and map location are below.
Contact.whatsappBody: We'll help you pick the right ride and answer availability questions.

Footer.trustSupportDesc: WhatsApp help, local tips, and quick answers when plans change mid-trip.
Footer.newsletterDesc: Occasional updates on seasonal offers, new arrivals, and Malta riding tips — no spam.
Footer.madeInMalta: Made in Malta · Built for riders and explorers

Footer.newsletterSuccessLong: Thanks — you are on the list. We will only send rental offers, tours, and Malta tips.

About.heroTitle: Find, Book and Rent easily with Explore Malta Rentals
About.narrativeP1: {companyName}, your go-to choice to experience Malta your way. From affordable self-drive motorbike rental, quadbike hire and bicycles, to a guided tour around Malta.
About.narrativeP2: We are passionate about helping locals and visitors experience the beauty of Malta in the most free, flexible, and affordable way possible.
About.narrativeP3: We specialize in Self-Drive Rentals, giving you the freedom to explore Malta at your own pace.
About.narrativeP4: Whether you're cruising along the coast, discovering beaches, or navigating historic sites, our reliable fleet ensures a smooth and enjoyable journey.
About.narrativeP5: We pride ourselves on offering some of the cheapest rental prices in Malta without compromising on quality or safety. Our vehicles are well-maintained, easy to ride, and perfect for both beginners and experienced riders.
About.narrativeP6: Looking for something more guided? We also provide custom tours on request, allowing you to discover Malta's top attractions and hidden gems with expert local insight.
About.exploreBody: Whether you want the thrill of Malta's scenic coastal roads, adventure on trails with an ATV, or a calm cycle through historic streets and seaside promenades — the island opens up when you choose your own rhythm.
About.exploreCta: Start your journey with us and explore Malta like never before.
About.fleetSectionDescription: Popular models and what you need to ride legally in Malta — ask us if you are unsure which option fits your license.
About.fleet50Body: Light and easy for town and coast. Typically suitable with a standard car (Category B) license — confirm your eligibility with us when booking.
About.fleet125Body: More performance for longer rides and open roads. Requires a motorcycle license appropriate for the class of vehicle.
About.fleet50Alt: NECO ONE 12 — 50cc scooter for town and coastal riding in Malta
About.fleet125Alt: Lex Moto Aura — 125cc motorcycle for longer rides in Malta
About.offerMotorcyclesDesc: Our fleet includes nimble scooters and motorbikes — well-prepared for Malta's roads and day trips.
About.offerMotorcyclesAlt: Lex Moto scooter — available from Explore Malta Rentals
About.offerAtvsDesc: Quad bike hire when you want trails and open stretches beyond the main roads — ask what's available.
About.offerAtvsAlt: ATV / quad bike hire in Malta
About.offerBicyclesDesc: Bicycle rental for a relaxed pace along promenades, lanes, and coastal routes.
About.offerToursDesc: Custom guided tours on request — discover top sights and hidden gems with local insight.
About.offerToursAlt: Map of Malta — guided tours and routes

BookingPage.heading: Multi-step booking for Explore Malta Rentals
BookingPage.intro: Complete all booking stages from vehicle selection to terms acceptance. Pricing and backend submission are introduced in the next phases.

lookup.submittedBody: Your booking reference is filled in below. Enter the same email address you used on the form, then choose “Load booking” to see your confirmation details from our system.
lookup.title: View an existing booking
lookup.lead: Use the booking reference from your confirmation email together with the email address you entered when you booked. We will load your rental summary from our database.

PrivacyPage.title: Privacy policy
PrivacyPage.intro: This page explains how Explore Malta Rentals handles personal data when you use our website and booking services.
PrivacyPage.body: This page is a placeholder. Add how you collect, store, and process personal data (including newsletter sign-ups) to meet GDPR and your hosting region's requirements.

Tours.heroLead: At {companyName}, we offer Custom Malta Tours designed to give you a unique and unforgettable experience of the island. Whether you prefer to explore independently or with a local expert, our tours are flexible and tailored to your needs.
Tours.quadImageCaption: Coastal routes, historic towns, and hidden bays — your itinerary, your pace.
Tours.bikesPhotoAlt: Motorbike and bicycle tours in Malta
Tours.customP1: Our Private Tours in Malta are fully customizable. You choose where to go, how long to stay, and what to see. From historic landmarks and scenic views to hidden beaches and local hotspots, we help you create the perfect itinerary.
Tours.customHighlight: Ideal for couples, friends, and small groups looking for a Personalized Malta Experience.
Tours.guidedBody: Want a deeper experience? Join one of our Guided Tours in Malta and discover the island with a knowledgeable local guide. Learn about Malta's history, culture, and hidden gems while enjoying a smooth and stress-free ride.
Tours.optionsDescription: Pick a style that fits your group — we tailor routes and duration around you.
Tours.whyDescription: Straightforward pricing, local insight, and plans built around your dates.
Tours.ctaBody: All tours are available on request, allowing us to tailor every detail to your preferences. Contact {companyName} today to plan your perfect Malta Motorbike Tour, Quad Bike Adventure, or Bicycle tour.
Tours.ctaTagline: Discover Malta your way, with freedom, flexibility, and unforgettable views.
Tours.contactDescription: Tell us what you have in mind — we will reply with a tailored suggestion and next steps.
Tours.contactWhatsAppHint: Prefer instant chat? Use WhatsApp for quick questions about routes, group size, and availability.

Guide.mapIntro: Use the live map to locate us quickly before your ride.
Guide.mapIframeTitle: Map location — Explore Malta Rentals, Pietà
Guide.mapSectionDescription: Tourist guide map with attraction points to help plan your route.
Guide.mapImageAlt: Tourist guide map of Malta with attractions
Guide.parkingSectionIntro: White lines mark the correct parking spot. Never park on yellow, blue, or green line colours: yellow for garages and reserved parking / no parking; blue for disabled bays; green for residents in the local area. Always park within MC spaces or between any two cars in a white parking space.
Guide.parkingMajor1Description: White lines mark the correct parking spot. Never park on yellow, blue, or green parking line colours. Yellow: garages and reserved parking / no parking. Blue: reserved for disabled permit holders. Green: residents in the local area. Always park within MC parking spaces or between any two cars in a white parking space.
Guide.parkingMajor2Description: Always park within the MC (motorcycle) parking spaces, or between any two cars in a white parking space.
Guide.parkingMajor2ImgAlt: Motorcycle (MC) parking — always use marked MC bays or white spaces between cars where permitted
Guide.parkingLineWhiteDescription: White lines mark the correct parking spots. Always park within the MC (motorcycle) parking spaces, or between any two cars in a white parking space.
Guide.parkingLineWhiteImg1Alt: White parking bay — park between cars in marked white spaces where rules allow
Guide.parkingLineWhiteImg2Alt: Motorcycle (MC) parking bay — use dedicated MC spaces
Guide.parkingLineYellowDescription: Do not park on yellow markings. Yellow is for garages and reserved parking / no parking.
Guide.parkingLineYellowImg1Alt: Double yellow lines at the road edge — do not park
Guide.parkingLineYellowImg2Alt: Reserved parking bay with yellow markings — do not park
Guide.parkingLineYellowImg3Alt: Yellow line road marking — do not park here
Guide.parkingLineBlueDescription: Do not park on blue markings. Blue is reserved for disabled permit holders.
Guide.parkingLineBlueImg1Alt: Blue-marked disabled parking bay — reserved for permit holders
Guide.parkingLineGreenDescription: Do not park on green markings. Green is for residents in the local area.
Guide.parkingLineGreenImg1Alt: Green line road marking — residents in the local area — do not park
